item.title: AI-Driven Power Line Inspection & Defect Detection Webinar
item.description: Learn AI-powered drone inspection for power transmission lines. Join our expert webinar on automated defect detection with AeroMegh GeoAI platform.

item.title: Webinar: Preventing Critical Misses in Defect Detection
item.description: Join technical experts from Voxel51 and MongoDB to explore a data-centric approach to defect detection.

item.title: Automated Defect Recognition and Artificial Intelligence (AI) in Digital Radiography
item.description: This webinar examines how AI and automated defect recognition (ADR) are transforming digital radiography, shifting the bottleneck from image acquisition to evaluation, and covering applications, standards, and regulatory considerations in NDT.

item.title: AI for NDT Professionals: Improving Accuracy, Speed, and Reliability
item.description: Explore how AI is transforming NDT through automated defect recognition in digital radiography. This webinar highlights practical implementation strategies, real-world case studies, and key benefits such as faster analysis, improved accuracy, and reduced costs. Designed for technicians, Level III supervisors, and managers.

item.title: Automated Quality Control for Roof Shingle Manufacturing with AI Visual Inspection
item.description: This was the first in our new industry-focused webinar series, where we dive deep into how Zetamotion’s AI-powered inspection technology tackles real-world bottlenecks in specific manufacturing sectors. By applying our Spectron platform and synthetic data capabilities, we show manufacturers practical ways to move from manual, inconsistent checks to reliable, real-time automated quality control, by boosting yield, cutting scrap, and delivering measurable ROI.

item.title: Beyond Defect Detection: The New Rules of AI Quality Control in 2026 - Zetamotion
item.description: We kicked off 2026 with our first webinar of the year, Beyond Defect Detection: The New Rules of AI Quality Control in 2026. The goal was simple. Look ahead at what is changing in machine vision, and talk honestly about why so many AI inspection projects still struggle to move beyond pilots and into full scale production.

item.title: Webinar on Tackling Quality Control with AI Vision - Elementary
item.description: Many manufacturers are exploring AI for quality control—but getting it working in production is still a challenge. From manual labeling to complex setup, traditional AI workflows can slow teams down. In this on-demand webinar, we share what we've learned from real-world deployments and show how self-supervised AI can simplify the process.
